description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a wooden full stock. The fore-end is ribbed and appears to be made of wood, designed for a secure grip during operation. The receiver and barrel are finished in a matte black or dark gray, contrasting with the reddish-brown wood of the stock and pump. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The shotgun has a robust, utilitarian appearance, with visible metallic and wooden components typical of urban law enforcement or civilian use. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for scenarios requiring reliable performance.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel, wooden full stock, and ribbed wooden fore-end. The design is robust and functional, with a rounded trigger guard and classic urban styling.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow, cylindrical profile with the ribbed fore-end and stock aligned.
description_view_1: A clear side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed pump, matte barrel, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Viewed from the butt end, the shotgun appears as a slim, elongated object with the stock and barrel in line, highlighting the symmetry.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the same features: full stock, ribbed pump, and matte barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
